meaning: n.物体,目标,宾语,对象vi.反对,拒绝,抗议vt.提出...来反对
examples: A rock is an inanimate object.
We were all too polite to object.
He became an object of universal derision.
Sanctity lies not in any object but in the spirit you bring to it.
Key themes will include human legacy and the ideas they express through lighting, subject and object choices.
